title: Bouncy Slimes
description: Slimes now jump higher than normal.
body:
# Bouncy Slimes Datapack
Questions or issues? -> discord: jodek | _or create an issue on github_ **With this datapack, slimes will jump higher than normal!** ### You can edit the value in: ``` data/bouncyslimes/functions/main.mcfunction ``` ### If you want to uninstall the datapack: ``` /function bouncyslimes:uninstall ```
